description: Evidence artifacts, build outputs, and governance documents produced under TLC 2.0 contracts.

artifacts.notes: Immutable halt condition log. Append-only. Never overwrite.

artifacts.notes: Contract lifecycle events. Append-only. Never overwrite.

artifacts.notes: V&T statement audit trail. Append-only. Never overwrite.

artifacts.notes: Schema-validated active contract. npm run validate confirms schema compliance.

artifacts.notes: Human-readable contract companion to BUILD_CONTRACT.json.

artifacts.notes: Core constitutional document. Preamble + Articles I-IX.

artifacts.notes: AJV-validated. Used by npm run validate.

artifacts.notes: Schema for individual evidence entries.

artifacts.notes: Schema for halt condition entries.

artifacts.notes: Schema for V&T (Verification and Truth) statements.

artifacts.label: Repo Repair Report — Tier 1 Promotion
artifacts.notes: Documents Tier-1 repair pass. Lists all implemented files and verification results.

artifacts.label: TLC 2.0 Identity Document
artifacts.notes: Created this session. Defines TLC 2.0 surfaces and truth status taxonomy.

artifacts.label: TLC 2.0 Integration Map
artifacts.notes: Created this session. Human-readable companion to registry JSON files.

artifacts.label: The Living Constitution — STATUS.json
artifacts.notes: Authoritative status artifact for TLC. tip_state_truth=tip_verified, reviewer_status=approved as of 2026-05-01. Path is relative to this repo root — resolves to the-living-constitution/STATUS.json in the parent Projects dir. Marked partial (not working) because this was read locally this session but not re-verified against CI.

artifacts.label: The Living Constitution — CRSP-001 Contract (Guardian Kernel)
artifacts.notes: Guardian Kernel CRSP contract. Tier-3-Constitutional, topology=TLC-Core, status=Active. Last verified 2026-04-08.

artifacts.label: The Living Constitution — THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md
artifacts.notes: Core constitutional document for the TLC project. Existence confirmed this session.

artifacts.label: Cognitive Governance Lab — governance-kernel Python package
artifacts.notes: Python governance library. Contains contract_window.py, bicameral_review.py, invariant_checkers.py, insight_atrophy_index.py. 62 tests passing locally as of 2026-05-13. Source of Contract Window reference implementation for TLC 2.0.

artifacts.label: Cognitive Governance Lab — Month 1 Gate Decision (Synthetic)
artifacts.notes: Synthetic calibration gate passed (2026-04-29). Full Month 1 gate NOT met: live pilot (10 sessions), human IRR (kappa >= 0.70), and session-protocol.md all pending.

artifacts.label: TLC Artifacts — Evidence Manifest (claim-to-session mapping)
artifacts.notes: Maps paper observations (Obs 1-4) to sessions, line ranges, and quotes. Obs 1 S01 line refs marked TBD. Obs 2 primary archive is external (.docx). Obs 4 cross-references cognitive-governance-lab. Not machine-checkable — human-readable index only.

artifacts.label: TLC Artifacts — Primary Evidence Session S01 (Claude, 2026-02-20)
artifacts.notes: Verbatim session transcript. Supports Obs 1 (multi-model constitutional coherence). Line references in evidence-manifest TBD — full audit pending. File exists on disk confirmed.

artifacts.label: TLC Artifacts — Codebook (annotation-guide + vt-statement-spec)
artifacts.notes: annotation-guide.md defines observational codes. vt-statement-spec.md formalizes the V&T statement format. Both files confirmed present.

artifacts.label: Agent Sentinel — metadata.json (capability descriptor)
artifacts.notes: Describes project as 'professional research tool for analyzing AI agent inference traces to detect constitutional breaches, misalignment, and model drift.' majorCapabilities array is empty. TypeScript compiles clean. Test suite fails on import.meta/Jest config mismatch. README has unresolved merge conflict.

artifacts.label: PROACTIVE — pyproject.toml (package descriptor v4.0.0)
artifacts.notes: Python package v4.0.0. Deps: anthropic, python-gitlab, click, requests, pydantic. Dev deps: pytest, pytest-cov. 731 tests pass.

artifacts.label: PROACTIVE — GitLab Duo agent config (proactive-agent.yml)
artifacts.notes: GitLab AI Catalog registration file. Present on disk. Not confirmed deployed to a live GitLab instance this session.

artifacts.label: ConsentChain — prisma/schema.prisma (data model)
artifacts.notes: Defines Agent, LedgerEntry, RevocationState, IdempotencyRecord, StepUpChallenge models. SQLite datasource. Migrations have run locally (dev.db exists). No production DB configured.

artifacts.label: ConsentChain — consentchain-build-contract.md (execution journal)
artifacts.notes: Start-from-zero execution sequence for the ConsentChain MVP. Not a CRSP governance contract. Documents build phases 0 through 15+. HANDOFF.md (2026-03-17) reports phases 14-15 partial complete.

artifacts.label: Consent Gateway Auth0 — component-inventory.json (tool manifest)
artifacts.notes: JSON manifest declaring connection, risk classification, requiredScopes, and audience per tool. Validated against COMPONENTS.schema.json. HANDOFF confirms schema validation passes. Central to the 8-stage gateway risk classification pipeline.

artifacts.label: Consent Gateway Auth0 — BLOG.md (hackathon writeup)
artifacts.notes: Hackathon blog post draft for Auth0 AI Agent Hackathon submission. HANDOFF references truth-corrections made to README and BLOG. Content verified for semantic accuracy by Corey during 2026-04-06 session.

artifacts.label: coreys-agentic-portfolio — AGENTS.md
artifacts.notes: Agent command reference and architecture summary. States explicitly: no test framework configured. Confirms Next.js 14/15 App Router, pnpm dev/build/lint commands, component system, and path aliases.

artifacts.label: coreys-agentic-portfolio — next.config.mjs
artifacts.notes: Next.js build config. ignoreBuildErrors:true and typescript.ignoreBuildErrors:true — suppresses tsc errors during build. Build passes with 7 suppressed tsc errors. images.unoptimized:true.
